–1. Also called JESHAIAH
  .Grandson of Zerubbabel1Ch 3:21
–2. Son of Jeduthun1Ch 25:3,15
–3. Grandson of Eliezer1Ch 26:25
–4. A Jew of the family of Elam, who returned from exileEzr 8:7
–5. A Levite who joined Ezra to return to JerusalemEzr 8:19
–6. A Benjamite, chosen by lot to live in Jerusalem after the 
exileNe 11:7
